tagline: Senior escalation leader aligning engineering, operations, and customer stakeholders to resolve critical service issues quickly and systematically.
twoPageSummary: Staff Escalation Manager with 16+ years in support engineering, mission-critical incident response, service recovery, and operational improvement. Deep experience stabilizing high-pressure customer-impacting situations, reducing alert and incident noise, building playbooks, and driving long-term engineering corrections behind repeated escalations.
portfolioSummary: Escalation management profile centered on customer-critical incidents, major response leadership, playbook-driven execution, and service improvement through operational data and structured feedback loops.
